svg.title: Olive Farm garden layout diagram
svg.desc: A top-down garden layout showing 6 beds arranged around a central path, with a compass, water point, and tool storage. Beds are grouped by type: cool-season flowers, edible flowers with herbs, brassicas, roots and alliums, warm-season crops, and climbing beans with zucchini.
svg.text: Top-down view · not to scale · north approx. up-slope

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bed 1 — the cool season flowers')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bed 2 — herbs and butterfly pea')
g.text: Future: Thai basil · lemongrass · perilla purple

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bed 3 — brassicas and leafy greens')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bed 4 — roots and alliums')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bed 5 — the warm season fruiting crops')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bed 6 — climbers and the trellis')
g.text: Build trellis structure now — plant later

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Where should I install the irrigation for this garden layout?')
sendPrompt('What tools do I need for this garden?')
